name: Rice and Spinach Soup (Minestrina Di Riso e S
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 quarts Basic Broth (or canned chicken broth)
3/4 cup Arborio rice (or long-grain rice) (5 oz)
recipeInstructions:
PREPARATION AND COOKING:
1. Rinse, drain, and stem the spinach.
2. Bring 4 quarts of water to boil in a large soup kettle.
3. Add the spinach and blanch until bright green and tender, about 1 minute.
4. Drain, refresh under cold running water, and coarsely chop.
5. Peel and coarsely chop the onion.
6. Peel and crush the garlic.
7. Grate the cheese (1 cup).
8. Heat olive oil and butter in a 6-quart soup kettle.
9. Add the garlic and onion and sauté over medium heat until softened, about 5 minutes.
10. Add the spinach and sauté for an additional 3 minutes.
11. Add the broth and bring to a boil.
12. Add the rice and simmer until tender, 18 to 20 minutes.
13. Season with salt if necessary.
SERVING:
14. Ladle soup into warm bowls; sprinkle with pepper and cheese.
Makes 8 to 10 servings.
